name: Nancy Rapaszky
body: Lyla and all of you continue to be in my daily prayers. I can not phathom making the hard decisions you are forced to make. Your faith is AMAZING and I believe God is guiding you. God's blessings to you beautiful people.

name: Laura White
body: Praying with the 1% that her speech remains. May God give you HIS WISDOM!! Hugs and Prayers 🙏.

name: Ashley Phillips
body: Wow. So much to pray for. Praying for you all this coming week, and every day. Hoping and praying for language when she wakes! ❤️🙏 We love you all lots!
